name: Cottage Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Press the cottage cheese through a sieve two times.
2. In a bowl, combine the butter, sugar, salt, flour, lemon rind, egg yolks, chopped raisins, nuts, and milk. Stir well until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
3. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the cottage cheese mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a baking dish.
6. Bake in a moderately hot oven (400 degrees Fahrenheit) for 30 minutes, or until browned and firm.
